testcase.name: test_utilisation_14d_shape

failure.message:
AssertionError: on_track row should have empty reasons: {'monday_id': '1961202323', 'monday_url': 'https://tessadavis06s-team.monday.com/boards/1956295952/pulses/1961202323', 'name': 'Hema Barot', 'email': 'dockhems@yahoo.co.in', 'tier': 'Private Plus', 'tier_raw': 'Gold', 'interview_date': '2026-04-30', 'days_until': 1, 'videos_submitted': 1, 'speciality': '', 'hospital': '', 'calls_used': 1, 'calls_allowance': 1, 'calls_pct': 100, 'videos_allowance': 15, 'videos_pct': 7, 'videos_min': 7, 'calls_min': 1, 'logic': 'or', 'reasons': ['1 / 15 videos used (need 7)']} assert ['1 / 15 vide...sed (need 7)'] == []
Left contains one more item: '1 / 15 videos used (need 7)'
Full diff: - [] + [ + '1 / 15 videos used (need 7)', + ]

testcase.failure:
E AssertionError: on_track row should have empty reasons: {'monday_id': '1961202323', 'monday_url': 'https://tessadavis06s-team.monday.com/boards/1956295952/pulses/1961202323', 'name': 'Hema Barot', 'email': 'dockhems@yahoo.co.in', 'tier': 'Private Plus', 'tier_raw': 'Gold', 'interview_date': '2026-04-30', 'days_until': 1, 'videos_submitted': 1, 'speciality': '', 'hospital': '', 'calls_used': 1, 'calls_allowance': 1, 'calls_pct': 100, 'videos_allowance': 15, 'videos_pct': 7, 'videos_min': 7, 'calls_min': 1, 'logic': 'or', 'reasons': ['1 / 15 videos used (need 7)']} assert ['1 / 15 vide...sed (need 7)'] == []
